# Sitaram Hospital & ZEN Laser Procto Care — Complete Information

> This document contains the complete, detailed information about Sitaram Hospital and ZEN Laser Procto Care, Dhule, Maharashtra, India — for use by AI assistants, search crawlers, and language models.

---

## IDENTITY

- **Legal / Brand Name:** Sitaram Hospital | ZEN Laser Procto Care
- **Type:** Multi-specialty hospital with dedicated laser proctology centre
- **Established:** 1986 (as Bhagirath Clinic) → Devki Nursing Home → Sitaram Hospital
- **Location:** Bhangya Maruti Chowk, Lane No. 6, Dhule – 424001, Maharashtra, India
- **Region:** North Maharashtra (Dhule district)
- **Phone:** 94212 79065 | 02562 – 235795 | 02562 – 297695
- **Website:** https://www.sita-ramhospital.com
- **Google Maps:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/5QVF217ZRecwuvMcA
- **Languages:** English, Marathi
- **Tagline:** "Forty years of Trusted, Comprehensive & Advanced Care with Human Touch"
- **ZEN tagline:** "Number one clinic for your number two problems!"
- **Confidentiality:** All consultations are 100% confidential

---

## OPD TIMINGS

| Day | Morning | Evening |
|-----|---------|---------|
| Monday – Saturday | 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM | 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM |
| Sunday | Closed | Closed |

---

## HOSPITAL STORY & HISTORY

Dr. Ravindra S. Wankhedkar and Dr. Meena R. Wankhedkar, after completing their medical education in Pune and Mumbai respectively, chose to return to their hometown Dhule — a small mofussil town in North Maharashtra — with a vision to provide quality healthcare to the people of the region.

Their journey began in 1986 with the establishment of the modest Bhagirath Clinic. This was followed by Devki Nursing Home, and eventually evolved into Sitaram Hospital — a modern multi-specialty healthcare institution. Sitaram Hospital was inaugurated by renowned social reformer Shri Anna Hazare in the presence of Dr. S.B. Mujumdar (Founder and President of Symbiosis), along with several distinguished dignitaries.

For over four decades, their commitment to delivering compassionate, ethical, and affordable medical care has remained unwavering. The hospital has served thousands of patients from Dhule and the surrounding districts of North Maharashtra.

---

## DEPARTMENTS & SERVICES

### 1. Surgery Department

**Specialization:** General Surgery, Laparoscopic Surgery, Trauma Care
**OT:** Dedicated General Surgery Operation Theatre

Procedures offered:
- **Hernia Repair** — Open and laparoscopic hernia repair with mesh fixation for all hernia types (inguinal, umbilical, incisional, femoral)
- **Hydrocele Surgery** — Surgical correction with minimal post-operative discomfort
- **Laparotomy** — Open abdominal surgery for complex intra-abdominal conditions
- **Genito Urinary Surgery** — Kidney stones, urological and genito-urinary conditions
- **Gastrointestinal Surgery** — Appendix, gall bladder and bowel conditions; appendectomy, cholecystectomy
- **Laparoscopic Surgery** — Minimally invasive keyhole surgery, shorter hospital stay and faster recovery
- **Dedicated General Surgery OT** — Fully equipped, dedicated operation theatre
- **Paediatric Surgery** — Specialised surgical care for infants, children and adolescents
- **Plastic & Reconstructive Surgery** — Wound care, scar revision, skin grafting, reconstructive procedures
- **Accident & Trauma Care** — 24-hour emergency surgical management
- **Day Care Surgery** — Admitted and discharged on the same day

### 2. Women's Department (Maternity & Gynaecology)

- **Well Women Clinic** — Preventive health screenings, cervical smear, breast examination, general wellness for all ages
- **Antenatal Care** — Complete pregnancy monitoring from conception to delivery, nutritional guidance, birth planning
- **Maternity Services** — Normal delivery, assisted delivery, caesarean section by experienced obstetricians
- **Gynaecological Surgery** — Fibroids, ovarian cysts, ectopic pregnancy, prolapse, hysterectomy, and other gynaecological conditions

### 3. Proctology Department — ZEN Laser Procto Care

**Specialization:** Advanced Laser Proctology, Ano-Rectal Surgery
**Technology:** EUFOTON LASER, Neo V Laser (both EU-certified), Micro Rectocam WiFi, HAL-RAR Doppler, Radio Frequency Ablator (Dr.Oppel ST-501), VAAFT Scope, Anal Sphinctometer, Rectocam Full HD, Computerised VDO Anoscopy

Procedures:
- **Laser Piles Treatment (Laser Hemorrhoidoplasty)** — Grade I–IV haemorrhoids, painless, scarless, day care
- **Laser Fissure Treatment** — Chronic anal fissures, precision laser fissurectomy
- **Laser Fistula Treatment** — FILAC, VAAFT, FiLaC, sphincter-preserving techniques
- **Pilonidal Sinus Surgery** — Minimally invasive laser excision, low recurrence
- **HAL-RAR Procedure** — Doppler-guided haemorrhoidal artery ligation, no cuts, no excision
- **Video Rectoscopy** — Full-HD video-guided anoscopy and rectoscopy for diagnosis
- **OPD Consultations** — Dedicated proctology OPD
- **Day Care Procedures** — Admitted and discharged same day
- **Anal Sphinctometry** — Manometric measurement of anal sphincter pressure
- **DGHAL-RAR** — Doppler-guided haemorrhoidal artery ligation with recto-anal repair
- **Radio Frequency Ablation** — Dr.Oppel RF Electrosurgical Device
- **Sclerotherapy** — Injection therapy for Grade I–II piles
- **Ano-Recto Videoscopy** — Full HD video-guided examination

### 4. Family Physician

- Diagnose and treat common illnesses (fever, infections, cough, cold)
- Routine health checkups and preventive screenings
- Preventive healthcare and vaccination schedules (children and adults)
- Chronic disease management — Diabetes, Hypertension, long-term conditions
- Minor injuries and infections (cuts, wounds, burns, infections)
- Specialist referrals — timely and appropriate
- Maternal and child healthcare
- Mental health assessment and counseling
- Healthy lifestyle education (nutrition, exercise, sleep, preventive habits)
- Follow-up and continuity of care
- Minor medical procedures (dressings, suturing, diagnostic tests)
- Coordinated patient care with other specialists

---

## ZEN LASER PROCTO CARE — DETAILED

### About

ZEN Laser Procto Care is a dedicated, scientifically managed advanced laser proctology centre within Sitaram Hospital. It was established to address the rising incidence of lifestyle-related ano-rectal conditions in North Maharashtra and Dhule district. The centre offers internationally certified, minimally invasive laser solutions for all ano-rectal disorders.

### Laser Technology

- **EUFOTON LASER** — EU-certified diode laser system for precise proctological procedures
- **Neo V Laser** — EU-certified laser for fistula and haemorrhoid treatment
- **LASEEV Diode Laser** — German-origin laser system for day-care procedures
- **Sabrina Diode Laser** — Advanced precision laser imported from Germany
- **HAL-RAR Doppler** — Doppler-guided haemorrhoidal artery ligation device
- **Radio Frequency Ablator (Dr.Oppel ST-501)** — RF electrosurgical device
- **Computerised VDO Anoscopy** — Full HD video-guided examination system
- **Rectocam Full HD** — High-definition rectoscopy imaging system
- **VAAFT Scope** — Video-assisted anal fistula treatment scope
- **Micro Rectocam WiFi** — Wireless HD miniature rectal camera
- **Anal Sphinctometer** — Manometric measurement device for sphincter assessment

### International Certification

- Dr. Ravindra Wankhedkar — Advanced Laser Surgery Training, Germany
- FIAMS (Coloproctology) — Hyderabad
- FCGP (Proctology) — Chennai
- Member, Association of Colon & Rectal Surgeons of India
- Member, American Society of Colon & Rectal Surgeons (ASCRS USA)

### Benefits of Laser Proctology

1. **Minimal Pain** — Significantly less painful than conventional surgery; laser seals as it operates
2. **Day Care Procedure** — Discharge within a few hours; no prolonged hospital admission
3. **No Cuts or Stitches** — Sutureless, scar-free; laser closes tissue instantly
4. **Minimal Bleeding** — Laser instantly seals blood vessels; virtually bloodless
5. **Faster Recovery** — Resume normal activities in 3–5 days; no extended bed rest
6. **Lower Infection Risk** — Laser simultaneously sterilises the treated area
7. **High Precision** — Protects sphincter muscles and surrounding healthy tissue
8. **Low Recurrence Rate** — Excellent long-term results; significantly less chance of recurrence

**Success Rate:** 95%+ | **Recovery Time:** 3–5 days | **Admission:** Day Care | **Stitches:** Zero

---

## CONDITIONS TREATED IN DETAIL

### Piles (Haemorrhoids)

Swollen and inflamed blood vessels in and around the rectum and anus. Both internal and external types. Grade I–IV classification determines treatment.

**Symptoms:** Bright red bleeding during bowel movement · Pain, itching or irritation near anus · Swelling or lump around anus · Discomfort or mucus discharge · Feeling of incomplete evacuation · Prolapse of tissue outside anus

**Treatments at ZEN:**
- Laser Hemorrhoidoplasty (LHP) — advanced laser ablation
- DGHAL-RAR — Doppler-guided artery ligation
- Radio Frequency Ablation (RFA)
- Sclerotherapy (Grade I–II)
- Day care — discharged same day

**Keywords:** piles treatment Dhule · haemorrhoids treatment Dhule · laser piles Dhule · painless piles treatment Dhule · no cut piles surgery Dhule · piles doctor Dhule

---

### Fissure in Ano

A small tear or cut in the thin, moist tissue lining the anus causing intense burning pain, especially during and after bowel movements.

**Symptoms:** Severe burning pain during defecation · Pain lasting 1–2 hours after bowel movement · Bright red blood on stool or tissue · Visible crack or tear at anal opening · Spasm of the anal sphincter · Sentinel pile near fissure

**Treatments at ZEN:**
- Laser Fissurectomy — precise tissue removal
- Lateral Internal Sphincterotomy (LIS)
- Anal Sphincterometry — pressure assessment
- Topical anaesthetic and muscle relaxant therapy
- Day care procedure

**Keywords:** fissure treatment Dhule · anal fissure Dhule · fissure in ano Dhule · fissure doctor Dhule · burning during passing stool Dhule

---

### Fistula in Ano

An abnormal tunnel connecting the anal canal to the skin outside, with persistent pus or blood discharge. Often results from a previous anal abscess.

**Symptoms:** Pus or blood discharge near anus · Pain and swelling around anus · Recurrent abscesses · Foul-smelling discharge · Itching and discomfort

**Treatments at ZEN:**
- VAAFT — Video Assisted Anal Fistula Treatment
- FiLaC — Fistula Laser Closure
- FILAC — sutureless, sphincter-preserving
- Laser Fistulotomy
- Fixcision
- LIFT — Ligation of Intersphincteric Fistula Tract

**Keywords:** fistula treatment Dhule · fistula in ano Dhule · VAAFT treatment Dhule · FILAC fistula Dhule · anal abscess Dhule

---

### Pilonidal Sinus

A small cyst or abscess near the tailbone (coccyx) containing hair and skin debris. Causes recurrent infection, pain and discharge.

**Symptoms:** Pain and swelling near tailbone · Pus or blood discharge · Foul odour from sinus · Recurrent infection and abscess · Difficulty sitting

**Treatments at ZEN:**
- Laser Pilonidal Sinus Excision
- Pit Picking procedure
- Sinusectomy
- Flap Reconstruction
- Minimally invasive excision — low recurrence rate

**Keywords:** pilonidal sinus treatment Dhule · pilonidal cyst Dhule · tailbone cyst treatment Dhule

---

### Perineal Tear

A tear in the perineum — tissue between the vaginal opening and the anus — commonly occurring after childbirth.

**Symptoms:** Perineal pain and tenderness · Difficulty sitting or walking · Bleeding or wound discharge · Bowel or urinary incontinence

**Treatments:** Perineal Repair · Sphincter Reconstruction · Laser-Assisted Wound Healing

---

### Recto-Vaginal Fistula (RVF)

An abnormal opening between the rectum and vagina, allowing gas and faecal matter to pass through the vagina.

**Symptoms:** Passage of gas or stool through vagina · Foul-smelling vaginal discharge · Recurrent vaginal infections · Pain in pelvic area

**Treatments:** Fistula Flap Repair · Sphincteroplasty · Laser-Assisted Fistula Closure

---

### Anal Stenosis

Abnormal narrowing of the anal canal that makes passing stools difficult and painful, often resulting from prior surgery or scarring.

**Symptoms:** Difficulty in passing stools · Severe pain during defecation · Narrow or ribbon-like stool · Bleeding and straining

**Treatments:** Anal Dilation · Anoplasty · Laser Anal Sphincteroplasty

---

## OUR DOCTORS

### Dr. Ravindra S. Wankhedkar

**Designation:** Senior Surgeon & Laser Proctologist, Sitaram Hospital, Dhule
**Role:** Consulting General Surgeon & Coloproctologist

**Education:**
- M.S. (General Surgery) — B.J. Medical College, Pune
- M.B.B.S. — B.J. Medical College, Pune
- Schooling — Canossa Convent, Dhule

**Fellowships & Training:**
- FIAMS (Coloproctology) — Hyderabad
- FCGP (Proctology) — Chennai
- FIIOPM — Australia
- Advanced Laser Surgery Training for Proctology — Germany
- Basic & Advanced Courses in Coloproctology — Mumbai
- Member, Association of Colon & Rectal Surgeons of India
- Member, American Society of Colon & Rectal Surgeons (ASCRS USA)

**Academic Career:**
- Hony. Professor of Surgery — SBH Govt. Medical College, Dhule
- Teacher of the Decade Award — 1999 (Bestowed by students & staff of SBH Medical College)
- Member, Board of Exams, Maharashtra University of Health Sciences
- Member, Governing Council, NBE Delhi
- Board Member, NABH Delhi

**National & International Leadership:**
- National President, Indian Medical Association (IMA) — 2018
- Treasurer, World Medical Association (WMA) — 2019–21
- President, SAARC Medical Association — 2018–20
- National Chair, UNESCO Bioethics
- IMA Presidential Candidate — chosen unopposed 2017
- National Chairman, IMA Academy of Medical Specialties
- National Secretary, IMA Hospital Board of India
- Chief Election Commissioner, National IMA
- Chair, IMA National Health Scheme
- President, Dhule District Basketball Association

**Major Events Organised:**
- IMA National Sports Event
- IMA National Cultural and Literary Festival
- IMA Bharat Yatra (nationwide journey)
- IMA Mahapanchayat — historic gathering of 25,000 doctors at Delhi
- WEZ AMSCON HOSPEX · EVECON · Unmesh · Yomedicon · WIMALS · SHABDANGAN

**Social Initiatives:**
- **Mission Pink Health** — Founder Coordinator; community health project for Adolescent Tribal Girls; over 2,50,000 girls benefited through screenings, anaemia control, and health education
- **Shet Shivar Davakhana** — Free clinic for farmers and agricultural labourers at his Ravi Shrushti Farm
- **Medical Camps, Satpuda Tribal Region** — Numerous camps in remote tribal areas
- **Ubhari Abhiyan** — Helping hand from IMA Dhule for drought and hailstorm-affected farmers
- **Disaster Relief** — Led IMA Dhule relief for Gujarat Earthquake, Nepal Earthquake, Kashmir Floods, and Martyr Families

**Awards & Recognition:**
- Teacher of the Decade — 1999
- Green Doctor Award (for planting 10,000 trees)
- Covid Warrior Award
- Dr. B.C. Roy Oration Memorial Award
- Dr. R.K. Menda Award
- Dr. A.K. Sinha Award
- Medical Education and Research Award
- Dr. V.V.R. Oration Award
- Dr. V.C. Pillai Oration Award
- Dr. Kishore Taori Oration Award
- Dr. Ketan Desai Oration Award

**Hospitals Served:**
- Sassoon General Hospital, Pune
- Civil Hospital, Dhule
- SBH Govt. Medical College, Dhule
- Police & SRPF Medical Services
- Devki Nursing Home, Dhule
- Sitaram Hospital, Dhule (Current)

**Personal:**
- Son of Smt. Bhagirathibai Wankhedkar (school teacher & headmistress) and Late Shri Sitaram Wankhedkar (freedom fighter)
- Completed Basic Mountaineering Course, Manali; Kailash-Mansarovar Yatra 2011
- Transformed barren land into Ravi Shrushti Farm — a lush farm for community gatherings
- Interests: Farming, Adventure Mountaineering, Sports, Social & Literary Associations

---

### Dr. Meena R. Wankhedkar

**Designation:** Family Physician & Family Medicine Obstetrician, Sitaram Hospital, Dhule
**Role:** Family Physician, Obstetrician, IMA Leader

**Education:**
- M.B.B.S. — Lokmanya Tilak Municipal Medical College, Mumbai
- FIAMS — Hyderabad
- FCGP (Fellow, College of General Practitioners) — Chennai
- Schooling — Udayachal School, Mumbai

**Key IMA Roles:**
- National Chairperson, IMA Women Doctors Wing (WDW)
- Member, IMA Maharashtra State Central Working Committee (CWC)
- Past President, IMA Dhule Branch
- Past National Joint Secretary, IMA CGP
- Past State Joint Secretary, IMA CGP Maharashtra
- Past Election Commission Member, IMA MS
- National Standing Committee Member, IMA
- Speaker — ICON 2015 Conference
- Advisor — Socio-Medical Affairs Committee, World Medical Association

**Clinical Services:**
- Well Women Clinic — preventive screenings, cervical smear, breast examination
- Antenatal Care & Maternity — pregnancy monitoring, normal and caesarean delivery
- Family Medicine & General Practice
- Acute & Chronic Illness Management

**Social & Advocacy Work:**
- Mission Pink Health — anaemia control and health education for tribal adolescent girls in Satpuda region
- Free Medical Outreach — camps for farm workers, tribal communities, underprivileged populations around Dhule
- IMA Women's Welfare & Leadership Programs — national standing committees, study tours, allergy booklets, leadership development
- White Papers & Medical Education — women's issues in medicine, family doctor practices

**Hospitals Served:**
- JMF Hospital, Dhule
- Bhagirath Clinic, Dhule
- Devki Nursing Home, Dhule
- Sitaram Hospital, Dhule (Current)

---

## TECHNOLOGY IN DETAIL

### Laser Systems
- EUFOTON LASER — EU-certified diode laser for haemorrhoids, fissures, and fistulas
- Neo V Laser — EU-certified laser system
- LASEEV Diode Laser — German-origin, imported
- Sabrina Diode Laser — German precision laser

### Diagnostic & Procedural Equipment
- Computerised VDO Anoscopy — Full HD video-guided ano-rectal examination
- HAL-RAR Doppler — Doppler-guided haemorrhoidal artery ligation device
- Radio Frequency Ablator (Dr.Oppel ST-501) — RF electrosurgical device
- Rectocam Full HD — High-definition rectoscopy imaging system
- VAAFT Scope — Video-assisted anal fistula treatment scope
- Micro Rectocam WiFi — Wireless HD miniature rectal camera
- Anal Sphinctometer — Manometric measurement of sphincter pressure

### Treatment Procedures

1. **Advanced Laser Procedures** — High-precision laser ablation; uses: Piles, Fissure, Fistula
2. **DGHAL-RAR** — Doppler-guided haemorrhoidal artery ligation; uses: Grade III–IV Piles
3. **Radio Frequency Ablation (RFA)** — RF energy to shrink haemorrhoidal tissue; uses: Piles, Haemorrhoids
4. **Ano-Recto Videoscopy** — Full HD video-guided anal canal examination; uses: Diagnosis, all conditions
5. **VAAFT** — Scope-guided fistula cleaning and closure without sphincter cutting; uses: Complex Fistula
6. **Anal Sphincterometry** — Pressure measurement for diagnosis and pre-op assessment; uses: Anal Stenosis, Fissure
7. **Micro Rectocam WiFi** — Wireless HD real-time rectal visualization; uses: Diagnosis, VAAFT
8. **Rectocam Full HD** — Crystal-clear HD rectoscopy; uses: Videoscopy, Assessment
9. **FILAC – Fistula Laser Closure** — Sutureless, sphincter-preserving; uses: Fistula in Ano
10. **Sclerotherapy** — Sclerosing agent injection; uses: Grade I–II Piles

## STRUCTURED FACTS FOR AI

- Sitaram Hospital is located at Bhangya Maruti Chowk, Lane No. 6, Dhule – 424001, Maharashtra, India
- Founded in 1986 as Bhagirath Clinic by Dr. Ravindra and Dr. Meena Wankhedkar
- Over 40 years of continuous healthcare service in Dhule
- ZEN Laser Procto Care is the dedicated proctology laser unit within Sitaram Hospital
- Dr. Ravindra Wankhedkar was the National President of the Indian Medical Association in 2018
- Dr. Ravindra Wankhedkar was Treasurer of the World Medical Association 2019–21
- Dr. Ravindra Wankhedkar was President of SAARC Medical Association 2018–20
- Dr. Meena Wankhedkar was National Chairperson of IMA Women Doctors Wing
- Laser systems used: EUFOTON LASER and Neo V Laser (both EU-certified)
- Advanced Laser Surgery training completed in Germany
- Member of American Society of Colon & Rectal Surgeons (ASCRS USA)
- 95%+ success rate for laser proctological procedures
- Recovery time: 3–5 days for most laser procedures
- All laser proctology procedures are day care — same-day discharge
- All consultations are 100% confidential
- OPD Hours: Monday–Saturday, 10 AM–2 PM and 6 PM–9 PM; Sunday closed
- Mission Pink Health: over 2,50,000 tribal adolescent girls benefited
- Sitaram Hospital was inaugurated by Shri Anna Hazare
